message:
bd-14n: implement relationship attribute parsing in proc macro

Add comprehensive relationship support to Model derive macro:

Relationship Types (auto-detected from field type):
- Related<T> -> ManyToOne (FK on this model)
- RelatedMany<T> -> OneToMany (FK on related model)
- Lazy<T> -> ManyToOne with lazy loading

Relationship Attributes:
- #[sqlmodel(relationship(model = "table"))] - required, target table
- foreign_key = "col" - local FK column (ManyToOne)
- remote_key = "col" - remote FK column (OneToMany)
- back_populates = "field" - bidirectional sync field
- lazy / lazy = true|false - enable lazy loading
- cascade_delete - cascade deletes to related
- one_to_one - explicit 1:1 relationship
- many_to_many - explicit M:N relationship
- link_table(table, local_column, remote_column) - M:N config

Code Generation:
- RELATIONSHIPS constant with RelationshipInfo array
- Proper builder pattern with optional methods
- Excludes relationship fields from INSERT/UPDATE/SELECT

Parsing:
- RelationshipAttr, LinkTableAttr, RelationshipKindAttr types
- detect_relationship_kind() for type inference
- Validation: relationship attr only on relationship types
- Comprehensive error messages

Tests:
- 20+ new tests for relationship parsing
- Edge cases: all options, multiple relationships
- Error cases: missing model, invalid attributes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
